en: I suppose I had something of a photography memory.
ko: 나는 사진 기억력이 좀 있었던 것 같아.

en: But then, one day, I dried.
And in the months that followed,
I noticed more forgetfulness, agitation, delusion, paranoia.
ko: 나는 더 많은 건망증, 초조함, 망상, 편집증을 느꼈어.

en: Several of your predecessors had far more serious afflictions,
ko: 너의 여러 선배들은 훨씬 더 심각한 병을 앓았고,

en: and they continued to govern without the public being any the wiser.
ko: 그들은 대중이 알지 못하는 채로 계속 통치했어.

en: No, ma'am, it's a mental health issue.
ko: 아니, 여사님, 이건 정신 건강 문제야.

en: I shall put myself in the hands of the doctors.
This will come as a terrible shock.
No shock lasts longer than 48 hours.
There's too much appetite for the next shock.
ko: 다음 충격에 대한 욕구가 너무 커.
